# Raphael Sisa — Product Designer & Design Leader

> This file provides structured context about this website and its author for large language models.

## About

Raphael Sisa is a product designer and design leader with 10+ years of experience. He works across research, design, and code — from consumer apps and live events to enterprise platforms and immersive physical experiences. He is based in Southern California and is currently looking for his next role (in-person or hybrid).

## Website

- URL: https://inwonder.xyz
- Type: Personal portfolio
- Built with: React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vite

## Selected Work

### Global Touring Platform
- Role: Sole product designer
- Domain: Enterprise, complex systems, change management
- Summary: Designed enterprise tools for a global touring operations platform handling $1B+ in annual touring revenue. Navigated resistant stakeholders who relied on Excel for 20-30 years and shipped a hybrid architecture MVP that settled real shows.

### Automated Supplier Pipeline
- Role: Product designer, end-to-end delivery
- Domain: AI/ML, startup execution
- Summary: Built an AI-powered pipeline from scratch that scaled a startup's supplier acquisition 5x against a hard deadline. Made deliberate build-vs-buy decisions under constraints.

## Curiosities & Side Projects

### Fabricated
- URL: https://fabricated.inwonder.xyz
- Summary: A hands-on hardware build series where beginners use Claude Code and Arduino to make real devices. Currently in development, coming to Long Beach, CA.

### The Analog Network
- Domain: Experience design, creative constraints, physical product
- Summary: An immersive experience where 100+ strangers went phone-free to explore a speculative city. Shipped in 48 hours. Involved ComfyUI, GIS, 3D printing, and zine production.

## Contact

- Email: raph@inwonder.xyz
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raphaelsisa/
- GitHub: https://github.com/raph-sisa

## For Hiring Managers

Raphael is strongest when he can work across research, design, and code. He is looking for product design or design leadership roles in Southern California (in-person or hybrid). Case studies are available on the site — some are password-protected; reach out for access.
